---
title: "Human-in-the-loop LLM agentic pharmacometric workflow"
description: "Part 1: Hello world"
author:
  - name: Marian Klose
    url: https://github.com/marianklose
    orcid: 0009-0005-1706-6289
date: 2026-05-23
categories: [llm, agentic workflows, human in the loop] 
image: preview.jpg
draft: false
draft-mode: visible
echo: true
execute:
  freeze: true # never re-render during project render (dependencies might change over time)
  echo: true
  message: false
  warning: false
citation: 
  url: https://marian-klose.com/posts/hitl_llm_agentic_pmx_workflow/index.html
format:
  html:
    number-sections: false
    toc: true
    collapse: false
    echo: true
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
---

# Prologue

## Motivation

Lorem ipsum

```{r filename="powershell"}
#| eval: false

setx OPENAI_API_KEY "your_api_key_here"
```

Lorem ipsum

```{python filename="xxx.py"}
#| eval: false

# load packages
from openai import OpenAI
import json

# initialize openai client
client = OpenAI()
```

Lorem ipsum


# Epilogue

Lorem ipsum.
